key_requirements: Agent execution loop (LLM turns, tool calls, approval flow)
AnalystAgent state machine (Active, Paused, Completed, Cancelled)
Config structure (system_prompt, max_turns, model, temperature, max_tokens)
Module dependency graph (agents, llm, tools, security, stream, context, storage, integrations)
C4 system context (users, LLM providers, platforms, file system)
Class hierarchy (Agent, LLMProvider, Tool, Storage, PlatformIntegration, StreamHandler, ApprovalHandler)
Message type (role, content, tool_calls, tool_call_id, metadata, timestamp)
LLMProvider trait (provider_name, supported_models, validate_model, complete, complete_stream)
CompletionRequest schema (messages, model, temperature, max_tokens, top_p, tools, extras)
CompletionResponse schema (content, tool_calls, finish_reason, usage, model, metadata)
Message conversion per provider (system, user, assistant, tool roles)
Tool trait (name, description, parameters, execute, definition, validate_arguments)
ToolRegistry (register, unregister, get, contains, tool_names, count, clear)
ToolExecutor (with timeout, with_retries, execute with error handling)
Tool execution flow (lookup, timeout, retry, error handling)
Context compression flow (auto-compress when over limit)
Message window management (always keep system, retain recent messages)
NovaError enum (LLMError, ToolError, SecurityViolation, Timeout, FileError, etc.)
Specific error variants (ApprovalRequired, ApprovalDenied, SecurityViolation, etc.)
Command execution errors (CommandFailed, CommandTimeout with exit_code/stderr)
Path validation logic (check against blocked/allowed lists)
Tool approval flow (approval → security checks → execution)
StreamEvent schema (started, thinking, text_chunk, tool_call_requested, execution events, approval events, completed, error)
Event flow state diagram (event transitions during execution)
Storage trait (save_session, load_session, list_sessions, delete_session, session_exists)
SessionState type (id, title, created_at, updated_at, status, messages, notes, findings, pending_clarification)
References to all related specs (architecture, core-types, agents, etc.)
PlatformIntegration trait (get_issue, list_issues, get_comments, post_comment, into_tools)
Issue schema (id, title, state, author, labels, comments, etc.)
GitHub, GitLab, Jira implementations and API mappings
